coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 18:36 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% for 18:36. So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting strong. 5 reps to go. The first one sets your standard for the rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 1/5. Target: 140% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Don't overshoot first 30s — settle in smoothly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Beginning strong. 3:36 at 140%. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First interval. Still optimistic. That'll change in about 3 minutes.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 140% for 3:36. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/5. 5:24 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:24. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 5:24. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/5. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/5. 55% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 46% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 0min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 46% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 46% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 46% done. 140% for 3:36. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/5. 5:24 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-100 rpm, 55-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/5. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/5. 5:24 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 4/5. 55% FTP × 5:24. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 140%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 130-140% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 18 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last one. Everything you have. Then you're done and you'll be stronger for it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 3:36 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 130-140% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 68% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 68% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 68% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 68% into session. 55%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.
